name: fc-template-mainline
description: Full Circle Strategic Marketing — Mainline template. Four-page Next.js site (Home / Services / About / Contact) with an industrial-precise aesthetic — split hero with emergency-call band on home, bold dark page heroes on inner pages. Designed for trades, contractors, and modern small business. Re-skinned per client by editing lib/site-config.ts and tailwind.config.ts only.
